title: Maayakumari
desc: A director sets out to make a biopic on a famed actress and explores her disappearance.

title: Mr. Majnu
desc: A charming flirt who has never been in a serious relationship with anyone finds himself in unfamiliar territory when he falls in love with a woman.

title: Golmaal
desc: Love connections are crossed in the complicated lives of three young orphans.

title: Honeymoon
desc: Couple's honeymoon turns emotional with family joining for land deal.

title: One
desc: An aspiring policeman conducts an informal investigation against a devious scientist.

title: Guru
desc: Best friends Raja and Iqbal, who hail from different religious backgrounds, help the local people. Their friendship is at stake when Raja's brother falls in love with Iqbal's fiancee.

title: Action
desc: Raka always gets what she desires, until she is rejected by Akash, a fellow student.

title: Golmaal Again
desc: Five orphan men return to their orphanage only to encounter the ghost of a friend.

title: Kelor Kirti
desc: Chaos ensues in the lives of three young couples after they come across a charming lady.

title: Chaya O Chobi
desc: Chaos ensues when an actress mysteriously disappears from an ongoing shooting of her film.

title: Ki Kore Toke Bolbo
desc: On their wedding night, Anjali tells her husband, Akash, that she wants to divorce him. However, months later, she falls in love with Akash.

title: Chaamp
desc: Shibaji, a famous Indian boxer, tries to revive his career after a tragic accident.

title: Loveria
desc: Car mechanich Aditya falls in love with Sweety, a rich, spoilt brat.Although they want to get married but her father opposes the relationship.

title: Tirandaj Shabor
desc: The arrival of a dead cab passenger at a police station triggers a murder investigation.

title: Joy Ma Kali Boarding
desc: Two desperate men hire actors to pose as their wives for couple-only lodging.

title: Paglu
desc: A college student follows his lover to the US, in an attempt to persuade her father.

title: Walter
desc: Walter, a small-town policeman, is approached by a couple whose newborn baby has disappeared. As his investigation deepens, Walter uncovers a much larger conspiracy.

title: Flyover
desc: A journalist working on a story about traffic rule violations gets in a tussle with the police.

title: Voice Of The Nation
desc: Contestants compete against each other in order to win the prestigious title. S01 E04.

title: Byomkesh Hatyamancha
desc: Detective Byomkesh Bakshi investigates a murder that takes place during a stage play.

title: Hero
desc: Shubhankhar's father, a constable, dreams of making him an IPS officer. But Shubhankhar only wants to enjoy life. He loves Puja, whose brother, a police superintendent, opposes their love.

title: Belashuru
desc: A family's bond strengthens while tending to a member diagnosed with Alzheimer's disease.

title: Jongole Mitin Mashi
desc: A detective is tasked with investigating a gang of poachers hunting wild elephants.

title: Aamar Mayer Shapath
desc: Vasanthi vows revenge after her husband is blamed for a temple theft.

title: Byomkesh Pawrbo
desc: While trying to solve a case, Byomkesh Bakshi comes across a bigger conspiracy.

title: Saap Mochan (2007)
desc: A shape-shifting snake turns into a beautiful woman to woo a young man.

title: One
desc: An aspiring policeman conducts an informal investigation against a devious scientist.

title: Miss Call
desc: Influenced by friends, Leela scams people with missed calls. She befriends Krishna, forming a close bond without meeting. When Leela goes missing, Krishna becomes the prime suspect.

title: Karnasubarner Guptodhon
desc: The vacation of Sona Da, Abir and Jhinuk becomes a pursuit of King Shashanka's treasures.

title: Bolo Na Tumi Amar
desc: Abhishek falls in love with Madhurima, a medical student. But Madhurima's father fixes her marriage with Soumyadeep Sen, a police inspector.

title: Ghare and Baire
desc: Amit decides to confess his love to Labonya when she agrees to get married to an NRI.

title: Raavan (2022)
desc: Raavan 2022 combines mythological drama with human emotions, exploring heroism, betrayal, and epic battles in cinematic spectacle.

title: VIP
desc: Raghuvaran remains unemployed for four years, as he is unwilling to accept jobs that are not related to his study. His redemption finally arrives, but for which, he pays a heavy price in his life.

title: Tiger
desc: A grief-stricken college professor adopts the name Tiger, vows to fight corrupt officials and avenge his son's death.

title: Silly Fellows
desc: Veerababu and his best friend try to impress an MLA. They land in trouble on learning that the MLA knows the whereabouts of an illegal stash of money.

title: Satma
desc: Satma explores deep emotional conflicts, revenge, and justice, revealing complex human motivations and intense personal journeys.

title: Hobu Chandra Raja Gobu Chandra Mantri
desc: Raja Hobu Chandra, the generous king of Bombagarh, keeps his subjects happy. However, things take a turn when he marries Princess Kusumkali of Chandragarh.

title: Shakthi
desc: Honest man Shakti becomes driver for local politician, faces trouble when he falls in love with Manoshi.
